title: LOCAL BUS PASS ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: CONGREGATIONS HELPING PEOPLE LOCAL BUS PASS ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides 2-day bus passes for local transportation. 1977 Front Street NE Salem, OR 97303 Eligibility: Individuals who are employed, students, or need transportation to work, a job interview, court appearance, or medical appointment. Individuals seeking transportation to a job interview must be working with a job source such as Oregon Worksource, Goodwill Job Connection, or People Ready. Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 391-4365 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 391-4365 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of employment, job interview, school schedule, court appearance, or medical appointment LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the Salvation Army building. Services: Transportation Passes Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - BIRTH CERTIFICATE AND OREGON ID CARD ASSISTANCE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - PRESCRIPTION ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CONGREGATIONS HELPING PEOPLE
